properties.headline: TEST FIXTURE Flash Flood Warning until 10:30PM CDT (reaped-whirlwind --test-email)
properties.description: TEST FIXTURE — do not act. 3 to 5 inches of rain has fallen in two hours; flash flooding ongoing on low-water crossings and small creeks.
properties.instruction: TEST FIXTURE — do not act. (Real NWS instruction would say: Turn around, don't drown when encountering flooded roads. Most flood deaths occur in vehicles.)
